creator: bourne.identity@hotmail.com
text:
Hi,

I am the author of the port sysutils/mkdesktop. While writing the port seemed like a good idea initially, it turns out that updating it for the latest changes in FreeBSD continuously is nearly an impossible task. The port is already defunct and I request it to be deleted/discontinued.

Thank you.

Manish Jain
< bourne.identity@hotmail.com >
